title: Priority pay-per-token for Foundation Model APIs
body:
Priority pay-per-token, also referred to as priority mode, for [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis) is generally available for partner models and in [preview](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types) for open source models.

Priority mode is for latency-sensitive, real-time applications that need more consistent availability under load.

See [Priority pay-per-token for Foundation Model APIs](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/priority-mode) for model availability.

ref_links.text: Priority pay-per-token for Foundation Model APIs
